title: Marketplace Manager - Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd - Top MNC
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Bengaluru-based team.

About Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Digital Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Pepperfry Consulting Pvt Ltd!
